text:
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
5 
FILE(S): 
APR Location 
APR License 
APR Identifiers 
APR bed type 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric character string (e.g., 1, 27, 00001, 5867, Z7720), and value ‘000’ means this record 
applies to all provider locations; or null/missing. 
COMMENT: 
The provider location identification number uniquely identifies the geographic locations applicable to 
the provider for each CCW_APR_LINK_KEY. The same PRVDR_LCTN_IDs may be used by multiple 
states;
